examples.code: function add(a,b)return a+b end
function reverse(s)local r=''for i=#s,1,-1 do r=r..s:sub(i,i)end return r end
function is_prime(n)if n<2 then return false end for i=2,math.sqrt(n)do if n%i==0 then return false end end return true end
function print_keys(t)for k,_ in pairs(t)do print(k)end end
local ok,err=pcall(function()error('test')end)if not ok then print('Caught:',err)end
function merge(t1,t2)for k,v in pairs(t2)do t1[k]=v end return t1 end
function filter(t,pred)local r={}for i,v in ipairs(t)do if pred(v)then r[#r+1]=v end end return r end
function fact(n)return n<2 and 1 or n*fact(n-1)end
function split(s,del)local r={}for m in s:gmatch('[^'..del..']+')do r[#r+1]=m end return r end
function deepcopy(t)local r={}for k,v in pairs(t)do r[type(k)=='table'and deepcopy(k)or k]=type(v)=='table'and deepcopy(v)or v end return r end
function get(t,k)return t and t[k]end
function clamp(v,min,max)return math.max(min,math.min(max,v))end
function tostr(t)local r='{'for k,v in pairs(t)do r=r..(type(k)=='string'and'"'..k..'"'or k)..':'..(type(v)=='string'and'"'..v..'"'or tostring(v))..','end return r:sub(1,-2)..'}'end
function max(t)local m=t[1]for i=2,#t do if t[i]>m then m=t[i]end end return m end
function debounce(fn,ms)local t return function(...)local a={...}if t then clear(t)end t=settimeout(function()fn(unpack(a))end,ms)end end
function memoize(fn)local c={}return function(...)local k=table.concat({...},',')if c[k]==nil then c[k]=fn(...)end return c[k]end end
function throttle(fn,ms)local l=0 return function(...)local n=os.time()*1e3 if n-l>ms then l=n return fn(...)end end end
function promise(fn)local r,s local p={then=function(c)r=c return p end,catch=function(e)s=e return p end}fn(function(v)r and r(v)end,function(e)s and s(e)end)return p end
function require_safe(mod,fallback)local ok,res=pcall(require,mod)return ok and res or fallback end
function diff(t1,t2)local r={}for k in pairs(t1)do if t2[k]==nil then r[k]=true end end return r end
function trim(s)return(s:gsub('^%s*(.-)%s*$','%1'))end
function invert(t)local r={}for k,v in pairs(t)do r[v]=k end return r end
function eq(a,b)if type(a)~='table'then return a==b end for k,v in pairs(a)do if not eq(v,b[k])then return false end end for k in pairs(b)do if a[k]==nil then return false end end return true end
function uuid()local function h()return string.format('%x',math.random(0,15))end return(('xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'):gsub('[xy]',h))end

examples.request: Увеличивай значение переменной try_count_n на каждой итерации
examples.code: return wf.vars.try_count_n + 1
